blog_title: Same Colour, 2 Vendors — One Looks Premium, One Cheap! Dyeing Check
caption:
Same navy blue. 500 pieces each. One looked premium, one looked cheap. 😬

We ordered from two vendors—identical colour code. Side by side? Total difference. Turns out one used reactive dyeing (dye goes deep into fibre), the other used pigment dyeing (sits on surface, fades after 3-4 washes).

Quick test: Rub a wet white cloth on your sample. Colour transfers? That's pigment dye—skip it. Always wash one piece before bulk orders.

Save this post before your next 1000-piece run. 👇
